data.title: SEC Set to Drop Coinbase Lawsuit, But Is Ripple’s Battle More Complex?
data.description:
The post SEC Set to Drop Coinbase Lawsuit, But Is Ripple’s Battle More Complex? appeared first on Coinpedia Fintech News
According to Fox Business reporter Eleanor Terrett, the proceedings in the Ripple case are more complex compared to Coinbase. This is because they already have an order from Judge Torres at the district level to pay the $125M penalty, she noted.  Will SEC Drop Appeal At...
source: https://coinpedia.org/news/sec-set-to-drop-coinbase-lawsuit-but-is-ripples-battle-more-complex/

data.title: Ben Zhou, CEO: Bybit is solvent, will cover all claims despite a growing withdrawal queue
data.description:
Bybit will repay all users, though some of the lost Ethereum (ETH) may be secured via a bridge loan for short-term claims. The exchange has enough reserves to compensate all users in kind, and is working through the withdrawal queue.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/ben-zhou-ceo-bybit-is-solvent-will-cover-all-claims-despite-a-growing-withdrawal-queue/

data.title: PEPE Erases Zero Amid Crypto Market Rebound, What's Next for Price?
data.description:
PEPE jumped as much as 7% as crypto market rebounded
source: https://u.today/pepe-erases-zero-amid-crypto-market-rebound-whats-next-for-price

data.title: Bitcoin mining will be profitable for at least 12 more years, says Blockware CEO
data.description:
Mason Jappa predicts Bitcoin mining will stay profitable for at least 12 more years, but post-2036, miners will rely on transaction fees or a $1 million BTC price.
source: https://www.thestreet.com/crypto/innovation/bitcoin-mining-will-be-profitable-for-at-least-12-years

data.title: Huge Moment For Crypto As SEC Agrees To Dismiss Enforcement Case Against Coinbase; Is XRP Lawsuit Next?
data.description:
The U.S. SEC has agreed in principle to drop the lawsuit against Coinbase, pending approval from the agency’s commissioners before it’s completely dropped.
source: https://zycrypto.com/huge-moment-for-crypto-as-sec-agrees-to-dismiss-enforcement-case-against-coinbase-is-xrp-lawsuit-next/

data.title: Graphite Network’s Bank Integration Demo Answers Powell’s Call for a Fresh Look at Debanking
data.description:

Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell’s words, spoken just a couple of days ago, are echoing across the industry: “My colleagues and I are struck by the growing number of cases of what appears to be debanking, and we’re determined to take a fresh look at...
source: https://coinpedia.org/information/graphite-networks-bank-integration-demo-answers-powells-call/

data.title: Federal Reserve Vice Chairman Jefferson: AI tools may help monetary policy transmission
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Federal Reserve Vice Chairman Jefferson said that artificial intelligence tools may help the transmission of monetary policy, but warned of the limitations of this technology. Jefferson said that research shows that automatic analysis of Federal Reserve information and automatic trading have increased the speed at which information is incorporated into asset prices. (Jinshi)

data.title: Telegram Game 'Farm Frens' Plots Migration to Line After Botched Base Token Airdrop
data.description:
The developers of Telegram game Farm Frens admitted to a number of issues with the token launch and airdrop on Ethereum layer-2 Base.
source: https://decrypt.co/307242/telegram-game-farm-frens-botched-base-airdrop

data.title: MNT fell below 0.9 USDT, with a 24-hour drop of 13.76%
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Market data shows that MNT fell below 0.9 USDT and is now at 0.89 USDT, with a 24-hour drop of 13.76%. 
Earlier news, Bybit suffered a security incident tonight, and funds worth US$1.44 billion were withdrawn, including 15,000 cmETH and 8,000 mETH.
